question: What NEW free, independent, isolate-level genotype->phenotype label sources exist across every family of life to seed new decoder cells?
method: 8 parallel kingdom scouts (WebSearch+WebFetch), each screening candidates against the decoder winning regime (curated target-site catalog + free/independent/isolate-level/wet-lab label) and the 8 rejection gates
meta_finding: Across nearly EVERY kingdom the curated catalog (regime fit) exists but the FREE+INDEPENDENT+ISOLATE-LEVEL label is the binding constraint - reconfirms the project north star ('labels not models') across the tree of life. The two label archetypes that clear the gates: (a) a measured MIC/EC50/bioassay INDEPENDENT of the catalog, or (b) DMS (molecular-property regime).

candidates.phenotype: second-line + new drugs (bedaquiline, linezolid, moxifloxacin/levofloxacin, amikacin, kanamycin, ethionamide, clofazimine, delamanid)
candidates.label_type: wet-lab broth-microdilution MIC (UKMYC plate) + ECOFF
candidates.est_n: 12,289 WGS+13-drug MIC (Zenodo superset 21,570)
gates: G8(TB monomorphic; Napier-barcode collapse already in-repo)
candidates.regime_fit: STRONG - WHO catalogue v2 already pinned in repo; same VCF pipeline as shipped RIF/INH
candidates.verdict: IMMEDIATE - lowest-friction new cells; same substrate + pipeline as shipped TB RIF/INH

candidates.label_type: wet-lab EC50 fold-change via MARKER TRANSFER into lab strain - INDEPENDENT of any algorithm (clears G1)
candidates.est_n: ~hundreds of characterized mutations across 3 genes (per-mutation, not per-isolate)
candidates.regime_fit: STRONG - curated RAS catalog + independent wet-lab fold-change; drops into existing HIV/SARS harness
candidates.verdict: TOP VIRAL - matches the project exact validated pattern (catalog scored vs fold-change); build first among viral

candidates.label_type: wet-lab MIC (agar dilution + Etest), EUCAST breakpoints
candidates.est_n: ~2,100-3,239 isolates/yr WGS+MIC (Euro-GASP surveys); several thousand aggregated
candidates.regime_fit: STRONG - Pathogenwatch curated penA/mtrR/gyrA/23S/rpsJ catalog + published genotype->MIC tables
candidates.verdict: HIGH - true wet-lab MIC + downloadable ENA assemblies + mature curated catalog

candidates.organism: human proteins (BRCA1, PTEN, TP53, TPMT, MSH2, +200)
candidates.label_type: DMS functional score (wet-lab MAVE) - G1-CLEAN by construction (direct measurement)
candidates.est_n: MaveDB 7M+ variant effects; ProteinGym 217 DMS / 2.5M subs
gates: MOLECULAR-PROPERTY REGIME(ESM can win; catalog less natural - project G2P boundary lesson)
candidates.regime_fit: cleanest free+independent+wet-lab variant-level; but molecular-property not organismal-drug regime
candidates.verdict: CLEANEST LABEL of all - but molecular-property regime (learned-scorer territory, not deterministic catalog); already partly in-repo (ProteinGym)

candidates.source: MalariaGEN Pf7/Pf8 (genotype) + WWARN SP Molecular Surveyor (independent phenotype)
candidates.label_type: clinical treatment outcome (day-28/42) + in-vitro pyrimethamine IC50 - INDEPENDENT of Pf7 inferred label
candidates.est_n: 16,203 (Pf7)/33,325 (Pf8) genotyped; paired genotype+outcome ~thousands
gates: G1-AVOIDED iff use WWARN outcome/IC50 NOT Pf7 inferred status
candidates.regime_fit: EXCELLENT - cleanest curated enzyme active-site catalog in protozoa after Kelch13
candidates.verdict: TOP PROTOZOA - free genotype at scale + independent WWARN phenotype; cost = building genotype<->outcome linkage

candidates.label_type: wet-lab EUCAST/CLSI broth-microdilution MIC
candidates.est_n: per-study 24-276; largest recent ~182 clinical WGS+MIC (accessions unverified)
candidates.regime_fit: EXCELLENT - FunResDB + FungAMR + MARDy provide CYP51A catalog; TR-mechanism is target-site/promoter
candidates.verdict: TOP FUNGAL - closest to a FREE fungal MIC label (CYP51A surveillance is genome-rich); pool per-study SRA + supp MIC

candidates.source: deep mutational scanning (DMS) of PA + focus-reduction EC50
candidates.label_type: DMS genotype->fold-change (dense, independent, free-in-supplement)
candidates.est_n: DMS library (engineered, not clinical isolates)
candidates.regime_fit: HIGH via DMS - small protein target ideal for mutant-level catalog
candidates.verdict: HIGH via DMS - the modern PhenoSense-analog for small viral targets

candidates.source: SRA/ENA amplicon + paper supplements; WormBase ParaSite refs
candidates.label_type: wet-lab bioassay - Egg Hatch Assay / Larval Development Assay EC50 / FECRT - INDEPENDENT of marker (clears G1)
candidates.est_n: dozens of studies, 10s-100s each; no consolidated table
candidates.regime_fit: BEST invertebrate - mature curated catalog (167/198/200/134) + free independent wet-lab bioassay + single target gene
candidates.verdict: TRUE AMR ANALOG (new kingdom) - clears G1/G3; needs data-engineering (single-worm subset / harvest supplements)

candidates.label_type: MIXED - much MIC is PBP-type-DERIVED in silico (G1); measured-MIC reference subset exists
candidates.est_n: ~20,924 genomes; measured-MIC subset thousands
gates: G1-LIVE(PBP->MIC lookup = the circular label to avoid)
candidates.regime_fit: GOOD for measured subset - curated pbp1A/2B/2X + ermB/mefA catalog
candidates.verdict: CONDITIONAL - decoder-ready ONLY after filtering to wet-lab-MIC records (de-circularize)

candidates.label_type: wet-lab MIC (YeastOne/CLSI)
candidates.est_n: 97-isolate + 51-isolate + 229 public genomes
gates: G6(echinocandin/azole MIC often <=/>= censored; operator-aware primitive exists)
candidates.regime_fit: GOOD - FKS1/FKS2 echinocandin is a clean target-site catalog; azole is efflux/PDR1-driven (weaker)
candidates.verdict: STRONG label density; echinocandin/FKS is the cleaner cell (azole confounded by efflux)

candidates.label_type: in-vitro piperaquine survival assay (%survival) + clinical DHA-PPQ day-42 failure
candidates.est_n: hundreds (GMS/Cambodia)
candidates.regime_fit: GOOD but primary determinant is copy-number amplification (not point mutation)
candidates.verdict: CNV-driven + narrow geography; secondary to SP

candidates.phenotype: herbicide target-site (ALS Pro197/Trp574, ACCase Ile1781/Asp2078, EPSPS Pro106, PSII Ser264, PPO dGly210)
candidates.source: Tranel catalog (rule) + Lolium Chile dose-response + Blackgrass PacBio pools
candidates.label_type: whole-plant dose-response bioassay (independent) + amplicon genotyping; weedscience.org = catalog/ontology only (aggregate counts, no paired table)
candidates.est_n: Lolium small-N populations; Blackgrass >100 individuals/pool many populations
gates: G1(many TSR-diagnostic papers CALL resistance from the mutation)
candidates.regime_fit: STRONG catalog (Murphy&Tranel 2019 = the rule); clean pairing rare (Lolium bioassay-first is cleanest)
candidates.verdict: CATALOG=ROBUST, LABELS=POOLED - needs single-plant genotype+bioassay-first pairs (rare); herbicide dominant gate is G8

candidates.label_type: wet-lab MIC (agar dilution/Etest)
candidates.est_n: SMALL/fragmented - studies 20-52 strains each; no compendium
candidates.regime_fit: EXCELLENT catalog (cleanest single-SNP 23S) but N is the blocker
candidates.verdict: CATALOG-CLEAN, N-BLOCKED - would need to aggregate many small BioProjects

candidates.label_type: CPE-assay measured resistance - genuinely isolate-level + independent
candidates.est_n: 124 isolates/68 patients; 96 phenotypically-R; 11 known+13 novel F13L
gates: G3/G4(resistance concentrated in immunocompromised multi-course patients)
candidates.regime_fit: emerging F13L catalog
candidates.verdict: MEDIUM - only isolate-level+measured viral find, but small-N + access-uncertain + G3

candidates.phenotype: pyrethroid (Vgsc kdr L1014F/S, N1575Y), OP/carbamate (ace-1 G119S), dieldrin (Rdl)
candidates.source: MalariaGEN Ag1000G (genotype) / VectorBase PopBio (paired) / APRD (case registry)
candidates.label_type: WHO tube / CDC bottle bioassay - POPULATION-level %mortality; Ag1000G is genotype-ONLY (specimen destroyed for WGS)
candidates.est_n: Ag1000G thousands (genotype-only); PopBio >21k pheno + >17k geno (cohort-level)
gates: G8(genotype+phenotype joined only at cohort node)
candidates.regime_fit: catalog strong (kdr/ace-1/Rdl) but NO per-individual genotype<->phenotype
candidates.verdict: STRUCTURAL G3/G8 - Ag1000G has individuals but no phenotype; PopBio pairs only at cohort resolution (ecological regression, not isolate cell)

candidates.label_type: often GENE-DERIVED (van presence = mechanism, near-tautological); measured MIC in AST fields
candidates.est_n: thousands (NCBI-PD)
gates: G1-STRONG(vanco-R approx vanA/vanB presence; catalog IS the label)
candidates.regime_fit: catalog trivially exists; genotype->phenotype is gene-presence identity (low to learn)
candidates.verdict: LOW novelty for vanco; linezolid (23S + acquired) is the more interesting sub-cell

candidates.label_type: wet-lab MIC, fragmented
candidates.est_n: small (e.g. 35R+7S C. parapsilosis)
candidates.regime_fit: MODERATE - azole-R multi-factorial (ERG11+CDR/MDR+UPC2/TAC1) dilutes target-site fit
candidates.verdict: MODERATE - real but scattered; CNV + efflux weaken target-site-only decoder

candidates.label_type: observed Mendelian phenotype per-animal + OMIA curation
candidates.est_n: ~340 variant-mapped traits; small N per trait
gates: G8(breeds approx clonal lineages; clonality-inflation trap)
G1-lite(if scoring OMIA class vs observed)
candidates.regime_fit: strong single-gene catalog + observed phenotype
candidates.verdict: REAL catalog+label but G8 breed-clonality; use OBSERVED trait not OMIA class; small N

candidates.label_type: CPIC diplotype->phenotype IS the catalog (G1); measured metabolizer phenotype is G5 access-gated (dbGaP/biobank); ClinVar embeds undisclosed computational evidence
candidates.est_n: CYP2D6 163 star alleles; ClinVar millions
candidates.regime_fit: richest catalog but label-blocked
candidates.verdict: REJECT for free label - catalog decoder-ready but independent label is access-gated (acquisition path, not plug-in)

candidates.source: REJECTED - geno2pheno/HCV-GLUE/HBVdb are G1 rules engines
candidates.label_type: algorithm-derived interpretation (G1 circular); independent replicon EC50 scattered in DAA-development supplements, no free compiled set
candidates.est_n: no free compiled isolate-level genotype-phenotype set
gates: G1-SEVERE(public DBs are the catalog own interpretation)
candidates.regime_fit: catalog exists but free label is algorithm-derived
candidates.verdict: LOW on the KEY criterion - no free independent phenotype set (unlike HIV PhenoSense)

candidates.label_type: mixed
candidates.est_n: varies (Trichomonas N=95 paired MLC verified)
gates: Leishmania: aneuploidy/CNV no catalog + treatment-failure != resistance
Trichomonas: honest label but NO curated catalog + G5 repetitive genome
candidates.regime_fit: NONE/POOR - regime mismatch or label confound
candidates.verdict: REJECT - no curated catalog or label-phenotype decoupling

candidates.label_type: none at usable scale - existing archaeal data is gene-knockout/transposon fitness (wrong regime) or taxon-descriptive traits (G3/G7 confounded)
candidates.est_n: ~0 archaeal DMS in ProteinGym/MaveDB (inferred, needs CSV check)
candidates.regime_fit: NONE - no archaeal analog of WHO-TB/CARD/HIVDB catalog
candidates.verdict: CLOSED NEGATIVE - only regime-compatible path is ACQUIRING a single archaeal extremophile-protein DMS
